ip_outcome_note: Card name 'Special Beam Cannon' is Piccolo's signature technique (Makankosappo). The card's own skill text reads: 'If your Leader Card is Piccolo, it gains +10000 power.' The depicted green-skinned figure with pointed ears performing the two-finger drilling beam is Piccolo — card text explicitly names him as the Leader synergy target.

trivia_bullets.text: Special Beam Cannon (BT4-068) is an Uncommon green Battle card from Colossal Warfare (DBS-B04), the fourth main booster set released for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, which released in July 2018. BT4 introduced the new [Bond] keyword skill anchored to Namekian characters — Piccolo's set-class identity in this series.

The Makankosappo (Japanese name, meaning 'Demon's Penetrating, Killing Light Gun') was developed by Piccolo after the 23rd Tenkaichi Budokai specifically to defeat Goku, then first deployed against Raditz in Dragon Ball Z episode 4 (May 1989). Its two-beam drilling structure — one straight, one coiling — is exactly what the card art depicts.
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki (Fandom): Special Beam Cannon

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-068's card effect reads: '[Activate: Battle] If your Leader Card is Piccolo, it gains +10000 power for the duration of the battle, then choose up to 1 card in your opponent's hand and place it in their Drop Area.' It is a Piccolo-leader-locked support card — mechanically enforcing the idea that only a Piccolo-piloted deck can harness the technique.
sources: WebSearch snippet citing levelupgamesmd.com and bigorbitcards.co.uk product listings for BT4-068
